# Damitha Cushion Works

Damitha Cushion Works is a cushion workshop at No.14, Galle Road, Pamburana, Matara, Sri Lanka.

## Services

- Sofa and couch cushions
- Outdoor and patio cushions
- Car seat cushions
- Custom cushion orders
- Foam replacement
- Re-upholstery

## Contact

- Phone: +94 76 643 8015
- WhatsApp: +94 70 224 9246
- Email: yeharadananjaya@gmail.com
- Workshop: No.14, Galle Road, Pamburana, Matara, Sri Lanka
- Hours: Monday to Sunday, 8:30 AM to 5:30 PM

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://damithacushionworks.com/
- Services: https://damithacushionworks.com/#services
- Work gallery: https://damithacushionworks.com/#work
- Contact: https://damithacushionworks.com/#contact
